text: Money can't buy you ____ happiness.
explanation: Абстрактное существительное happiness употребляется без артикля: Money can't buy you happiness.

text: He could read for _ hours.
explanation: Устойчивое выражение for hours — «часами» — употребляется без артикля.

text: He'll need to be able to run ..…….than this if he's going to do the competition.
explanation: Сравнительная степень far — farther (further): run farther than this.

text: Marat works very hard. It's not _ that he's always tired.
explanation: Ситуация вызывает чувство — прилагательное на -ing: It's not surprising.

text: We went shopping and spent _ money.
explanation: Money — неисчисляемое существительное: a lot of money (many — только с исчисляемыми).

text: Which unit is still often used in Britain to talk about distance despite the metric system?
explanation: В Великобритании расстояния по-прежнему часто измеряют в милях (miles).

text: I ________ home when I met Daniel. He looked sad. Maybe, he was sick.
explanation: Past Continuous — действие в процессе, прерванное другим: I was walking home when I met Daniel.

text: I will return your book ___ .
explanation: «Через какой-то срок» — предлог in: in two weeks.

text: I've just started to learn how to drive. Now I _ how difficult it is.
explanation: Know — глагол состояния, не употребляется в Continuous: Now I know.

text: I  ____by a loud noise at night.
explanation: Страдательный залог в Past Simple: I was woken up by a loud noise.

text: Our company …. significantly over the past year.
explanation: Present Perfect с указателем over the past year: has grown.

text: _ the music awards live tomorrow nights?
explanation: Оборот to be going to в вопросе: Are they going to broadcast…?

text: At the time the company closed down I ____ there for several years.
explanation: Past Perfect Continuous — действие длилось вплоть до момента в прошлом: had been working for several years.

text: …. I have a look at that bag in the window, please.
explanation: Вежливая просьба: Could I have a look…?

text: The company is expected … a healthy profit this year.
explanation: Конструкция be expected + to-инфинитив: is expected to make.

text: On _ home, I found my daughter waiting outside her front door.
explanation: После предлога on употребляется герундий: On returning home…

text: If you … too much fast food, it's not good for your health.
explanation: Условное предложение нулевого типа: If you eat…, it's not good…

text: What if your cat suddenly … to you right now? How would you react?
explanation: Нереальная ситуация в настоящем (второй тип): What if your cat suddenly started talking…?

text: Popular way of having a green home is using
explanation: В тексте: Using solar energy is a very popular way — энергия солнца.

text: There are many volunteers who show their _____ to make a contribution to the Earth's protection.
explanation: Волонтёры демонстрируют желание (desire) внести вклад в защиту Земли.

text: The quality of green homes depends on
explanation: Green builders want to use materials that last a very long time — долговечные материалы.

text: According to the text, eco-friendly way of life is

options.text: a future plan of the state

explanation: Most owners say it's a good idea — такой образ жизни одобряется большинством.

text: Building a regular home is often

options.text: more expensive than building green home
much more expensive than building green home
more reasonable than building green home

explanation: Зелёный дом обычно дороже обычного, значит обычный дом дешевле (cheaper).

text: If people need to build eco-friendly houses

options.text: it is not efficient for the economy of a country
it is good for the Earth
it is good for homeless people

explanation: Экологичное строительство приносит пользу Земле: important benefits to the Earth.

text: These days people use
explanation: В тексте упоминаются eco-friendly shopping bags как повседневная привычка.

text: The green movement
explanation: The green movement started about 40 years ago — много лет назад.

text: According to the text “Green Homes, Dream Homes”, how much of all its raw materials does the United States use on new buildings?
explanation: В тексте: The United States uses 40 percent of all its raw materials on new buildings.

text: According to the text “Green Homes, Dream Homes”, green homes need to be located

options.text: close to the things people need or to public transportation
in places with a lot of sunlight only

explanation: Homes need to be close to the things people need for their daily lives, or to public transportation.

text: Music improves:
explanation: Music boosts certain language abilities in the brain.

text: The text is about:

options.text: a connection between music and language abilities
playing different types of musical instruments
brain functioning and different types of patients

explanation: Текст посвящён связи музыки и языковых способностей.

text: According to the researcher Nina Kraus playing a musical instrument:

options.text: can boost a person's hearing ability
can boost a person's dancing skills
can boost a person's ability to talk in a noisy room
can boost a person's writing skills

explanation: Исследование Нины Краус: игра на инструменте улучшает слуховые способности (hearing ability).

text: The synonym of improve is
explanation: Boost — синоним improve («улучшать, усиливать»).

text: The reason why musicians can hear better is

options.text: that they are trained to pay attention to particular sounds
that they are trained to sing and play different instruments
that they hear their own instruments and many others
that they use certain language abilities in the brain

explanation: Musicians learn to pay attention to certain sounds — умеют выделять нужные звуки.

text: Find the true statement

options.text: Nina Kraus plays in an orchestra
Nina Kraus is a  graduate of Harvard University

explanation: В тексте Нина Краус названа researcher — исследователь.

text: Music helps people to improve
explanation: Music improves concentration, memory, listening skills.

text: The synonym of to ignore:
explanation: To ignore = to pay no attention to — «не обращать внимания».

text: According to the text “A Musical Boost”, where does Gottfried Schlaug work?

options.text: at a research laboratory in Japan

explanation: Gottfried Schlaug — a doctor at Harvard Medical School.

text: Although Dr. Schlaug's stroke patients could not speak normally, they could still
explanation: However, they can still sing — пациенты сохраняли способность петь.

text: According to the text, singing helps stroke patients to speak because music

options.text: activates different parts of the brain, including the damaged parts
helps them to relax and sleep better
makes them repeat words many times

explanation: Music seems to activate different parts of the brain, including the damaged parts.

text: By the time we arrived at the cinema, the film ___.
explanation: Past Perfect — действие произошло до другого действия в прошлом: had already started.

text: She has been living in Almaty ___ 2019.
explanation: Present Perfect Continuous с точкой отсчёта — предлог since: since 2019.

text: If I ___ you, I would apply for this master's programme.
explanation: Второй тип условного предложения: If I were you, I would…

text: The final report must ___ by Friday.
explanation: Модальный глагол + пассивный инфинитив: must be submitted.

text: I look forward to ___ from you soon.
explanation: Look forward to + герундий: look forward to hearing from you.

text: Neither of the answers ___ correct.
explanation: После neither of глагол стоит в единственном числе: Neither of the answers is correct.

text: This exercise is ___ than the previous one.
explanation: Многосложные прилагательные образуют сравнительную степень с more: more difficult.

text: She asked me where ___.
explanation: Косвенный вопрос: прямой порядок слов и сдвиг времени — She asked me where I lived.

text: You ___ smoke in the laboratory. It is forbidden.
explanation: Строгий запрет выражается mustn't: You mustn't smoke…

text: The results ___ analysed at the moment.
explanation: Present Continuous в страдательном залоге: The results are being analysed.

text: Choose the synonym of accomplish:
explanation: Accomplish = achieve — «достигать, выполнять».

text: By the time she arrived at the station, the train ___.
explanation: Действие, завершившееся до другого действия в прошлом, — Past Perfect: the train had left.

text: I have known him ___ ten years.
explanation: С периодом времени (ten years) в Present Perfect используется for.

text: ___ you mind opening the window?
explanation: Вежливая просьба: Would you mind + герундий (opening).

text: The report ___ by the team last week.
explanation: Пассив в прошедшем времени: was + III форма (written).

text: She is the ___ student in the whole class.
explanation: Превосходная степень длинного прилагательного: the most intelligent.

text: If it ___ tomorrow, we will stay at home.
explanation: Первое условное: в придаточном с if — Present Simple (rains).

text: Choose the synonym of significant:
explanation: significant означает «значительный, важный» — синоним important.

text: He asked me if I ___ help him with the project.
explanation: В косвенной речи can меняется на could.

text: There isn't ___ milk left in the fridge.
explanation: milk — неисчисляемое существительное, с ним используется much.

text: I'm not used to ___ up so early.
explanation: После be used to употребляется герундий: getting up.

text: Neither Tom nor his friends ___ coming to the party.
explanation: При neither...nor глагол согласуется с ближайшим подлежащим (friends) — are.

text: That's the man ___ car was stolen yesterday.
explanation: Принадлежность выражает относительное местоимение whose.

text: You ___ to wear a helmet on a motorcycle. It's the law.
explanation: Обязанность, установленная правилом, выражается конструкцией have to: have to wear.

text: My sister is very good ___ mathematics.
explanation: Устойчивое сочетание good at (something).

text: By next June, I ___ here for ten years.
explanation: Действие, которое завершится к моменту в будущем, — Future Perfect: will have worked.

text: Choose the synonym of purchase:
explanation: purchase означает «покупать» — синоним buy.

text: ___ the heavy rain, we decided to go for a walk.
explanation: Despite + существительное (the heavy rain) вводит уступку.

text: The novel ___ I read last month was fascinating.
explanation: Для неодушевлённого предмета в определительном придаточном — that (или which).

text: If I ___ known about the meeting, I would have come.
explanation: Третье условное: в придаточном Past Perfect — had known.

text: It's high time we ___ this problem.
explanation: После It's high time используется прошедшее время: solved.

text: He plays the guitar ___ than his brother.
explanation: Сравнительная степень от well — better.

text: I'd rather you ___ smoke in here.
explanation: После would rather (о другом человеке) используется прошедшее время: didn't.

text: The success of the project depends ___ careful planning.
explanation: Устойчивое сочетание depend on.

text: Hardly ___ sat down when the phone rang.
explanation: После Hardly в начале предложения — инверсия: had I sat down.

text: Choose the synonym of enormous:
explanation: enormous означает «огромный» — синоним huge.

text: The news ___ really shocking this morning.
explanation: news — неисчисляемое существительное в единственном числе: was.

text: The teacher made the students ___ the exercise again.
explanation: После make (в активе) используется инфинитив без to: make somebody do.

text: ___ arriving home, she realised she had lost her keys.
explanation: On + герундий означает «как только»: On arriving = as soon as she arrived.

text: I wish I ___ more free time to travel.
explanation: Wish о нереальном настоящем требует Past Simple: I wish I had.

text: Choose the synonym of reduce:
explanation: reduce означает «уменьшать» — синоним decrease.

text: The text “A Trip to the Stars” is mainly about

options.text: the growth of space tourism for ordinary people
the history of the International Space Station

explanation: Текст в целом посвящён развитию космического туризма для обычных людей.

text: According to the text, the first space tourist travelled in
explanation: «Back in 2001, an American businessman ... spend several days on the ISS.»

text: A typical tourist flight lasts about
explanation: «The whole experience lasts only about ten minutes.»

text: During the flight, passengers

options.text: stay in their seats the whole time
float weightlessly for a few minutes

explanation: «For a few minutes passengers float weightlessly and admire the curve of the planet.»

text: Critics of space tourism argue that the flights

options.text: are expensive and pollute the atmosphere

explanation: «Critics argue that these flights are expensive toys for the rich and that the rockets pollute the atmosphere.»

text: Supporters believe that space tourism will
explanation: «Tourism will help fund important scientific research.»

text: According to the text, ticket prices are

options.text: still very high but slowly falling

explanation: «Prices, although still enormous, are slowly falling.»

text: The synonym of enormous is
explanation: enormous означает «огромный» — синоним huge.

text: The synonym of unforgettable is
explanation: unforgettable означает «незабываемый» — синоним memorable.

text: Which statement is TRUE according to the text?

options.text: Only astronauts can travel to space today.
Space tourism is becoming a reality faster than expected.
No tourists have ever reached space.
Space travel is described only in science fiction now.

explanation: «The dream ... is becoming a reality faster than anyone expected.»

text: The text “Working from Home” is mainly about

options.text: how to build a bigger office
the rise of remote and hybrid working
the history of the laptop computer

explanation: Текст рассказывает о распространении удалённой и гибридной работы.

text: According to the text, one advantage of remote work is that employees
explanation: «They no longer wasted hours travelling ... spend more time with their families.»

text: According to the text, companies saved money by
explanation: «Companies ... could save money by renting smaller offices.»

text: One problem of remote work mentioned in the text is that some people

options.text: felt lonely and missed their colleagues

explanation: «Some people felt lonely and missed talking to their colleagues face to face.»

text: In the text, “hybrid” work means

options.text: working partly in the office and partly at home
working in two jobs at once

explanation: «Employees spend part of the week in the office and part at home.»

text: According to the experts in the text, flexible work
explanation: «Experts believe that this flexible approach is here to stay.»

text: Some remote workers found it difficult to

options.text: separate their work from their private life

explanation: «Others found it difficult to separate their working hours from their private life.»

text: The synonym of benefits is
explanation: benefits означает «преимущества, выгоды» — синоним advantages.

text: The synonym of disappearing is
explanation: disappearing означает «исчезающий» — синоним vanishing.

text: Which statement is TRUE according to the text?

options.text: Remote work has no disadvantages at all.
Many companies now use a hybrid model combining home and office.
All companies have banned working from home.
Working from home was common ten years ago.

explanation: «Many companies have chosen a middle path known as hybrid work.»
